---
title: "summary"
author: "Jia Yuhan"
output: 
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```



```{r ,fig.width=12, fig.height=7,echo=F}


library(kableExtra)
```


# 500
```{r ,fig.width=12, fig.height=7,echo=F}


load(file = "summary_navie_ci_ns500_DM.rdata")
source(file = "evalua.R")


```



## DM1
```{r,results='asis',echo=F }


i=1 


print(rho_list_diffz[[i]])
    

    res1 <- evalua(res = reslist[[i]], beta_t = betat)[[1]][,-c(9:20,25)]

    # 18
    kable(res1, format = "html", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      add_header_above(c("-"=3,"ANDI" = 5, "Naive" = 5)) %>%
      column_spec(1, width = "5em") %>%
      column_spec(2, width = "8em")%>%print
    
    cat("\n")
    
    res2 <- evalua(res =reslist[[i]], beta_t = betat)[[2]]
    
    kable(res2, format = "html", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      add_header_above(c("-"=3,"ANDI" = 5, "Naive" = 5)) %>%
      column_spec(1, width = "5em") %>%
      column_spec(2, width = "8em")%>%print
    

    cat("\n")
   



```

## DM2
```{r,results='asis',echo=F }


i=2


print(rho_list_diffz[[i]])


    res1 <- evalua(res = reslist[[i]], beta_t = betat)[[1]][,-c(9:20,25)]
    

    kable(res1, format = "html", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      add_header_above(c("-"=3,"ANDI" = 5, "Naive" = 5)) %>%
      column_spec(1, width = "5em") %>%
      column_spec(2, width = "8em")%>%print
    
    cat("\n")
    
    res2 <- evalua(res =reslist[[i]], beta_t = betat)[[2]]
    
    kable(res2, format = "html", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      add_header_above(c("-"=3,"ANDI" = 5, "Naive" = 5)) %>%
      column_spec(1, width = "5em") %>%
      column_spec(2, width = "8em")%>%print
    

    cat("\n")
   



```

## DM3 beta all different betaz -30%
```{r,results='asis' ,echo=F}

i=3 


print(rho_list_diffz[[i]])
    

    res1 <- evalua(res = reslist[[i]], beta_t = betat)[[1]][,-c(9:20,25)]

    kable(res1, format = "html", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      add_header_above(c("-"=3,"ANDI" = 5, "Naive" = 5)) %>%
      column_spec(1, width = "5em") %>%
      column_spec(2, width = "8em")%>%print
    
    cat("\n")
    
    res2 <- evalua(res =reslist[[i]], beta_t = betat)[[2]]
    
    kable(res2, format = "html", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      add_header_above(c("-"=3,"ANDI" = 5, "Naive" = 5)) %>%
      column_spec(1, width = "5em") %>%
      column_spec(2, width = "8em")%>%print
    

    cat("\n")
   



```




## DM4 beta all different betaz +30%
```{r,results='asis' ,echo=F}

i=4 


print(rho_list_diffz[[i]])
    

    res1 <- evalua(res = reslist[[i]], beta_t = betat)[[1]][,-c(9:20,25)]
    

    kable(res1, format = "html", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      add_header_above(c("-"=3,"ANDI" = 5, "Naive" = 5)) %>%
      column_spec(1, width = "5em") %>%
      column_spec(2, width = "8em")%>%print
    
    cat("\n")
    
    res2 <- evalua(res =reslist[[i]], beta_t = betat)[[2]]
    
    kable(res2, format = "html", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
      kable_styling(full_width = FALSE) %>%
      add_header_above(c("-"=3,"ANDI" = 5, "Naive" = 5)) %>%
      column_spec(1, width = "5em") %>%
      column_spec(2, width = "8em")%>%print
    

    cat("\n")
   


```
